title: T-028 — V03/V04 validators (Pack_Size in Reference; D365 material status)
prompt:
# T-028 — V03 + V04 validators

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §12 V03, V04 + §10.8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement V03 (Pack_Size in Reference.PackSizes) and V04 (material code status from d365_import_cache, comma-sep handling, status union {Found, NoCost, Missing, Empty}) validators.

## Implementation contract
New packages/validation/src/v03-pack-size.ts and v04-d365-material.ts. v03 returns FAIL if value not in PackSizes for tenant. v04 splits comma-sep, queries d365_import_cache, returns worst status (Missing > NoCost > Found) plus per-cell statuses array. Both pure async functions, db client injected for testability.

## Files
- packages/validation/src/v03-pack-size.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v04-d365-material.ts [create]
- packages/validation/__tests__/v03.test.ts [create]
- packages/validation/__tests__/v04.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0019_d365_import_cache.sql [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Reference.PackSizes contains '250g', when v03('500g') runs, then it returns FAIL with message naming the unknown pack size
2. Given d365_import_cache rows {RM123: Found, RM456: Missing}, when v04('RM123, RM456') runs, then status='Missing' and details array shows both cells
3. Given d365_import_cache empty, when v04('RM999') runs, then status='Empty' (skip)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 unit tests + cache migration smoke
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter validation test v03 && pnpm --filter validation test v04'

## Risk red lines
- Do not block save on V04 NoCost
- Do not query without tenant_id
- Do not consider trailing whitespace as part of code

pipeline_inputs.description: V03 Pack_Size membership + V04 D365 material status (comma-sep, worst-status reduction).
